financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well because it's making more money from both new and returning customers.
They are financially stable, but their profit growth is slower than expected, which could be a concern later.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, even though new taxes and labor laws have slightly slowed profit growth.
Despite higher costs due to these changes, the company remains financially strong and doesn't need extra money to keep growing.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay but not great in caring for people and communities.
Their management and decision-making practices are decent, but there's room for improvement.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial results and market standing.
They consistently shared positive news about growth and achievements, even when asked tough questions.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Poor
bullets: The company didn't share enough specific numbers about their future plans, making it hard to fully understand their strategy.
They talked about improving products and profits but didn't give clear details, which makes their communication seem unclear.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well and expects to keep growing, but they're being careful not to overpromise.
They have a strong plan and enough money to handle challenges, even though some past issues still need fixing.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: SBI Life Insurance is doing well because it's growing fast and has strong financial health.
The company is focusing on digital improvements and has a lot of customer trust, which helps it stay competitive.
